# minio_pool_status (Data Source)

Reports status information about the storage pools in a MinIO cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_pool_status" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `pools` (List of Object) List of pools and their current status. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pools))

<a id="nestedatt--pools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pools`

Read-Only:

- `decommission_info` (String)
- `endpoints` (String)
- `index` (Number)
- `last_update` (String)
- `state` (String)
